articles.author: Kaitlin Sullivan
articles.title: FDA pulls proposed rule barring teens from using tanning beds - NBC News
articles.description: The Food and Drug Administration on Tuesday withdrew a proposed rule that would have barred all Americans under age 18 from using tanning beds.
articles.content:
The Food and Drug Administration on Tuesday withdrew a proposed rule that would have barred all Americans under age 18 from using tanning beds.
